tool_args.label: Offset Bus Lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues
tool_args.raw_text: Offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues

payload.location_text: Woodhaven Boulevard between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues, Queens
payload.description: Dedicated one lane for buses and right turns from Metropolitan Ave to Eliot Ave, proposed to be in effect 7am-7pm Monday-Friday

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven Boulevard between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues, Queens

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues

• Dedicate one lane for buses and right turns from Metropolitan Ave to Eliot Ave • General traffic would not have to merge at the bridges • Buses can bypass congestion • Proposed to be in effect 7am-7pm, Monday-Friday

tool_args.label: Curbside Bus Lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard
tool_args.raw_text: Curbside bus lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard

payload.location_text: Woodhaven Boulevard northbound approaching Liberty Ave, and southbound approaching Rockaway Blvd, Queens
payload.description: Curbside bus lane northbound approaching Liberty Ave, and southbound approaching Rockaway Blvd, proposed in effect 7am-7pm on the last block, and peak periods only on other blocks

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven Boulevard northbound approaching Liberty Ave, and southbound approaching Rockaway Blvd, Queens

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Curbside bus lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard

• Curbside bus lane northbound approaching Liberty Ave, and southbound approaching Rockaway Blvd • Proposed in effect 7am-7pm on the last block, and peak periods only on other blocks • Allows bus to reach subway connection, getting past backups without removing travel lanes

tool_args.label: SBS and traffic flow proposals
tool_args.raw_text: Continue to provide 3 continuous lanes for general traffic • Reconfigure roadway to better use extra space without creating merges • Redesign complex intersections such as Park Lane South • Use service roads • Study local, limited, and express bus services

payload.claim_text: Continue to provide 3 continuous lanes for general traffic. Reconfigure roadway to better use extra space without creating merges (bus lanes, medians, narrowed crossing distances). Redesign complex intersections such as Park Lane South. Use service roads in appropriate ways. Study local, limited, and express bus services.
payload.subject: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Continue to provide 3 continuous lanes for general traffic • Reconfigure roadway to better use "extra" space without creating merges (bus lanes, medians, narrowed crossing distances) • Redesign complex intersections such as Park Lane South • Use service roads in appropriate ways • Study local, limited, and express bus services
